revision.change_summary: Migrated MQB tool coverage to revisioned evidence model and removed implied universal support

autel.notes: Record exact vehicle, cluster or immobiliser type, function, adapter and software version in workshop history before marking exact support.

xhorse.notes: Key generation capability and vehicle programming capability must be verified separately.

obdstar.notes: No verified shared MQB coverage has yet been entered in this component.

smart_pro.notes: No verified shared MQB coverage has yet been entered in this component.

exclusions.condition: Exact model, year, cluster, immobiliser generation or security variant is not identified
exclusions.action: Do not display a tool as confirmed supported

conditions: Tool coverage can change with software updates and must include the tested software version
Add-key and all-keys-lost coverage are separate capabilities
Adapters, bench cables and server or online requirements must be recorded per verification event
